[event]
# Reset map
type=event
location=1,1,1,1
activate=on_load
script=scripts/maps/iron_labyrinth/reset.txt

[event]
# Treasure Chest
type=event
location=7,7,1,1
activate=on_trigger
hotspot=location

mapmod=object,23,68,209;object,23,71,223;object,23,69,0;object,23,70,0;collision,22,69,0;collision,22,70,0;collision,23,69,0;collision,23,70,0;object,32,68,213;object,32,71,219;object,33,69,0;object,33,70,0;collision,32,69,0;collision,32,70,0;collision,33,69,0;collision,33,70,0;object,27,67,166
repeat=false
set_status=emp_il_door_a3e,emp_il_door_b3w
soundfx=soundfx/door_open.ogg
tooltip=Switch

[event]
# Door a3e
type=event
location=22,69,2,2
activate=on_trigger
hotspot=location
mapmod=object,23,68,209;object,23,71,223;object,23,69,0;object,23,70,0;collision,22,69,0;collision,22,70,0;collision,23,69,0;collision,23,70,0
remove_item=1105:1
repeat=false
requires_item=1105
requires_not_status=emp_il_door_a3e
set_status=emp_il_door_a3e
soundfx=soundfx/door_open.ogg
tooltip=Locked Door

[event]
# Door a3e locked
type=event
location=22,69,2,2
activate=on_trigger
hotspot=location
msg=This door needs a key to be opened.
requires_not_item=1105
requires_not_status=emp_il_door_a3e
tooltip=Locked Door

[event]
# Stairs Up
type=event
location=12,12,4,4
activate=on_trigger
hotspot=location
npc=npcs/iron_labyrinth_stairs.txt
requires_not_status=emp_il_exit
set_status=emp_il_exit
tooltip=Stairs

[event]
# Reset exit prompt
type=event
location=12,16,4,1
unset_status=emp_il_exit
